name: Explosive Arrow
description: Ammunition listed as Trevo Mine loot.
notes: Useful only for bow users or sale/storage.

name: Ferrystone
description: Consumable fast-travel item used with Portcrystals.
notes: Useful but scarce early; do not waste during OP route unless route safety requires it.

name: Golden Trove Beetle
notes: Use only with verified map positions; never mark exact location without own check.

name: Grievous Horns
description: Early archistaff used for the Sorcerer unlock route.
notes: Found in Trevo Mine for Vocation Frustration; keep until turned in or vocation is unlocked.

name: Jasper
description: Valuable/trade material listed as Trevo Mine loot.
notes: Route treats this as optional value loot.

name: Ranger's Tights
description: Leg armor listed for Trevo Mine route data.
notes: Optional early loot; verify exact stats later.

name: Ring of Cooling
description: Accessory loot associated with Trevo Mine route data.
notes: Exact stats should be checked in own playthrough before using in calculations.

name: Signs of Valor
description: Weapon/loot listed for Trevo Mine route data.
notes: Keep as low-priority loot until item stats are verified.

name: Two-Hander
description: Early greatsword used for the Warrior unlock route.
notes: Found in Trevo Mine for Vocation Frustration; keep until turned in or vocation is unlocked.
